concerns.text: T013 mandates downloading data from 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/numenta/NAB/master/data/...' (NAB dataset) instead of the CHERRL repository specified in spec.md (FR-001) and plan.md. This is a silent relaxation of the data source constraint, violating the reproducibility principle and the specific functional requirement to ingest CHERRL logs.

T032 implements a 'Wilcoxon signed-rank test', but spec.md FR-005 explicitly mandates a 'paired t-test'. While the plan.md mentions Wilcoxon as a complexity tracking note, the Functional Requirement (FR-005) is the binding constraint for the task deliverable. Implementing a different statistical test without explicit spec amendment weakens the requirement to validate the specific claim defined in FR-005.

T030 describes implementing the independence check but omits the mandatory 'halt' behavior required by spec.md FR-006 and plan.md Constitution Check VI. The task description implies calculation but fails to enforce the constraint that the system MUST halt and emit an error if correlation > 0.8, risking circular validation if the error handling is not explicitly coded.

T032 references a baseline of 'last [deferred] of training steps'. While 'deferred' is allowed in planning docs, the task description must define the implementation logic (e.g., 'implement logic to calculate baseline from last X% of steps where X is a configurable parameter') rather than carrying forward an unresolved placeholder that prevents the task from being fully actionable or testable.
